A

AbstractPosLink - Class in com.pax.poslink
The parent of PosLink.
AbstractPosLink.ReportStatusListener - Interface in com.pax.poslink
Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when terminal reported integer status.
Ac - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Authorization Code, tag 89
AcceptedCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The card type bitmap, refer to Card Type Bitmap definition.
AcceptedCardType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
The card type bitmap, refer to Card Type Bitmap definition.
It makes POS system available to control which card types accepted for current command.
AccessibilityPinPad - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
The standard of accessibility to support and the status and visibility of “Accessibility Switch” on the Input Account screen.
AccountNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The account number must have a length between 13 and 19 characters.
It's mandatory when the 'PIN Algorithm' is set to 0 (ISO9564_0) or 3 (ISO9564 3), with Encryption Type as 1 (DES DUKPT) or 2 (Master Session DES).
Additionally, it's required for 4 (ISO9564_4) when the Encryption Type is 3 (AES DUKPT).
ACCOUNTPAYMENT - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
ACI - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
ACI for Visa.
ACTIVATE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
addExtClass(ExternalClass) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.ExternalClass
add the external class to the list
AdditionalFees - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
Additional fees.
AdditionalFleetData1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
Additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
AdditionalFleetData1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
Additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
AdditionalFleetData1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
Additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
AdditionalFleetData2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCard
Deprecated.
More additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
AdditionalFleetData2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardRequest
More additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.
AdditionalFleetData2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.FleetCardResponse
More additional cardholder fleet data field reserved for forward compatibility.

Response AddlRspData

Response AddlRspData
AddlRspData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Response AddlRspData
AddlRspDataFlag - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior
Additional response data request flag;
Address - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.AVSInformation
Card holder address 1
Address2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.AVSInformation
Card holder address 2
ADJUST - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
AESDUKPTAvailableKeySlotCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse
Number of key slots remaining available for AES DUKPT
AESDUKPTKey - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse.GetPEDInfoResponse
An array of AES DUKPT Key info.
afterProcessTrans() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
 
afterProcessTrans() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.PosLink
 
AgreementNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Car-Rental Agreement/Invoice Number issued by the rental agency.
Aid - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Application Dedicated File (ADF) Name, tag 4F
Aip - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Application Interchange Profile, tag 82
ALL - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.EDCType
 
AllocatedMiles - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Maximum miles allocated for rental without charge.
AlternateTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
The alternate
AlternateTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
The alternate
AMEXAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
AmexAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
AMEXCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
AmexCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
Amount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The base amount, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the transaction is LOYALTY, this field is the points, if this field is NULL, terminal will prompt dialog to enter the amount.
Amount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
The base amount, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the transaction is LOYALTY, this field is the points, if this field is NULL, terminal will prompt dialog to enter the amount.
If the terminal is under demo mode, running transactions with special amount will trigger special results.
Please refer to Special Amount in Demo Mode for more details.
Amount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
The Original Amount, $$$$$$$CC.
AmountLine - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The Amount information between the TenderType TransType line and “Please Insert/Swipe Card” line on the Screen.
AppActivated - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Whether the application is activated
appDataFolder - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
In android system, it is recommend to set the appDataFolder to getApplicationContext().getFilesDir().getAbsolutePath().
If this is not set, it will use getApplicationContext().getFilesDir().getAbsolutePath() in Android and "./" in PC Java.
AppLabel - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Application Label, tag 50
ApplePayVAS() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
 
ApplePayVASData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Apple Pay VAS specific data.
Only valid when TransType = VASSETMERCHANTPARAMETERS.
Please refer to ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS for detail
AppName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse.DeviceInfo
Application name.
AppPreferName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Application Preferred Name, tag 9F12
ApprovedAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.
ApprovedAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.
ApprovedCashBackAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The cash back amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedCashBackAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The cash back amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedMerchantFee - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The surcharge fee/Merchant fee approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedMerchantFee - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The surcharge fee/Merchant fee approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedTaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The tax amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedTaxAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The tax amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedTipAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
ApprovedTipAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
AppVersion - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse.DeviceInfo
Application version.
Arc - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Authorization Response Code, tag 8A
Arqc - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Authorisation Request Cryptogram, tag 9F26.
Atc - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Application Transaction Counter, tag 9F36
AthNtwkID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
Authorizing Network ID.
Auc - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Tag 9F07.
Indicates issuer’s specified restrictions on the geographic usage and services allowed for the application
AUTH - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchRequest
Retrieve the transaction record with the matching authorization number.
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse
Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Voice Authorization Code obtained via telephone from the payment host.
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor .
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest
Retrieve the transaction record with the matching authorization number.
AuthCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor.
AuthorizationCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
EMV tag 89.
AuthorizationResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.Original
Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
AuthorizationResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
AuthorizationResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
AuthorizationResult - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Indicate the transaction result.
AutoRentalInfo - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Auto Rental information.
AutoRentalInfo() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
 
AutoSubmit - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Deprecated. 
AutoUploadIntervalTime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Auto uploading checking interval in unit of 100ms.
AutoUploadIntervalTime - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Auto uploading checking interval in unit of 100ms.
Avn - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Application Version Number, tag 9F08
AVSApprovalCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.AVSInformation
Please see the host specification for the details; if host returned the value, this is mandatory.
AVSInformation - Class in com.pax.poslink.entity
 
AVSInformation() - Constructor for class com.pax.poslink.entity.AVSInformation
 
AVSInformation - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
Response AVSInformation
AVSMessage - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.AVSInformation
The AVS response message, if host returned AVS message, this field is mandatory.
AvsResponse - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
AVS response.
